Welcome, Young Learner!

Full accounts require age 16+ due to data protection laws. But you can still use My Expense Ledger in Guest Mode — perfect for learning financial literacy!

GUEST MODE INCLUDES:
✅ Import & track expenses
✅ Import & track income
✅ Categorize your spending
✅ View expense & income ledger
✅ Multi-currency support
❌ Cloud sync (data stays on device)
❌ Dashboard & charts
❌ Budget targets
❌ PDF reports
No personal data collected. No phone number needed.
When you turn 16, you can upgrade to a full account and keep all your data.

My Expense Ledger
TERMS & CONDITIONS — Please read before continuing

1. Your Data & Privacy

All financial data you enter is stored in your personal Firebase account under a unique private ID. It is completely private. No other user can access your data. Your phone number is stored as a one-way hash that cannot be reversed or read by anyone, including the developer.

2. Data We Collect

We collect the following data to operate the app: your full name, username, date of birth, hashed phone number, email address (optional), country code, PIN hash, expense and income entries, budget settings, avatar preference, and referral records. Your email address, if provided, is stored solely for account recovery and duplicate account detection. It is never shared with third parties or used for marketing.

3. Data Storage

Your data is stored in Google Firebase Firestore, protected by security rules ensuring only you can read or write your data. We do not sell, share, or transfer your data to any third party. Email addresses are stored under your user account settings and also recorded in the user registry solely to enable account recovery by email.

4. Authentication & PIN Security

Your PIN is hashed before storage using a one-way algorithm and is never stored in plain text. The app uses a PIN pad for daily login. A periodic full identity check is triggered randomly every 1 to 2 weeks, requiring your username or phone number plus PIN. New users are exempt from the identity check immediately after registration.

5. Registration & Duplicate Detection

During registration, the app checks your phone number, chosen username, and email address in real time against our Firebase user registry to detect duplicate accounts. A verification step (0–100% progress overlay) confirms all three before your account is created. This prevents multiple accounts being registered with the same identity details. The verification result is saved to your device and synced to the cloud.

6. Session Security & Auto-Lock

The app automatically locks after 10 minutes of inactivity. The lock also triggers when you minimise the browser, switch tabs, or your phone screen turns off. The app remembers which screen you were on (PIN pad or inner app) when you last used it, so a page refresh always returns you to the correct screen.

7. Account Recovery by Email

If you add an email address to your profile, you can use it to reset your PIN. Enter your email on the "Forgot your PIN?" screen. The system looks up your account and displays a temporary reset code on screen. No email is sent — the code is shown directly to you for security and cost reasons. Your email is also used to detect duplicate registrations.

8. Account Deletion

You have the right to permanently delete your account and all associated data at any time via Manage → Delete Account. A 4-step process guides you: (1) an exit questionnaire asking for your reason, (2) PIN confirmation, (3) a deletion progress indicator, and (4) a completion screen. Your exit reason and optional feedback message are saved anonymously to a Firebase collection to help improve the app. All personal data — expenses, income, settings, deleted items, user registry entry, and credentials — is permanently and irreversibly deleted. This data cannot be recovered.

9. Usage Analytics

This app uses Google Analytics to collect anonymous usage statistics. No personal financial data, names, phone numbers, or email addresses are ever sent to Google Analytics.

10. No Advertising

This app contains no advertisements. We do not use your financial data for advertising or marketing purposes of any kind.

11. Recycle Bin & Data Deletion

Deleted entries are moved to a Recycle Bin before permanent deletion. You can restore or permanently delete items from the bin at any time. Your cloud data is never deleted without your explicit action.

12. Multi-Currency Support

The app supports multiple world currencies including NGN, EUR, USD, GBP, GHS, and many others. No currency conversion is performed — amounts are saved exactly as entered using the symbol you type. You may add custom currencies in Manage → Currency Manager.

13. Print Reports

Reports are generated entirely on your device. No data is sent to any external server during printing. PDF reports include all charts for each selected currency.

14. Referral Programme

Each user has a unique referral link tied to their username. When someone registers via your link, only the count of referrals is shown to you — no names, phone numbers, or personal details of referred users are ever revealed. Referral records stored in Firebase contain only the referrer's username, the month of signup, and a timestamp.

15. Age Restriction

My Expense Ledger is only available to users aged 16 and above, in line with GDPR recommendations. Users under 16 are offered a Guest Mode with limited features where no personal data is sent to our servers. By registering for a full account, you confirm you are at least 16 years old.

16. Guest Mode (Under 16)

Users under 16 may use Guest Mode (Import, Categorise, Ledger, Manage). In Guest Mode all data is stored locally on the device only — nothing is sent to Firebase. Guest users may upgrade to a full account when they turn 16.

17. Avatar & Profile Customisation

Users may choose an emoji avatar for their profile. This is stored locally and synced to Firebase under the user's account. No biometric, facial, or photographic data is collected. Avatar choices are optional and can be changed at any time.

18. Local Storage & Device Data

This app uses your device's local storage (similar to cookies) and session storage to remember your session, active tab, screen state, and preferences. No tracking cookies are used. Local storage is cleared when you log out or delete your account. By using this app you consent to this use of local storage.

19. Updates & Version Policy

When a new version of the app is deployed, all users are required to re-read and re-accept these Terms before continuing. This ensures all users are always aware of the latest terms.

20. Governing Law

These Terms and Privacy Policy are governed by the laws of the Federal Republic of Nigeria (Nigeria Data Protection Regulation — NDPR) and comply with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) of the European Union where applicable.

21. Developer & Branding

My Expense Ledger was designed and built by John-de-Scholar (John Damilola Sunday). By using this app you accept that the developer name appears on the login screen, Help panel, and printed reports.

22. Last Updated

This Privacy Policy and Terms of Service were last updated on 25 March 2026 (v2.4.0). We reserve the right to update these terms. All users will be required to re-accept updated terms upon next login.

23. Contact

Questions about your data or these terms? Contact us at myfinanceledgerapp [at] gmail.com. We aim to respond within 48 hours.

MY EXPENSE LEDGER — MARCH 2026 — v2.4.1
By tapping Accept you confirm you have read and agree to the above terms.

1. Your Data & Privacy

All financial data you enter is stored in your personal Firebase account under a unique private ID. It is completely private. No other user can access your data.

2. Data Storage

Your data is stored in Google Firebase Firestore. We do not sell, share, or transfer your data to any third party.

3. Authentication & PIN Security

Your PIN is hashed and never stored in plain text. A periodic full identity check is triggered every 1–2 weeks.

4. Session Security & Auto-Lock

The app locks after 10 minutes of inactivity.

5. Usage Analytics

Anonymous usage statistics via Google Analytics. No financial data is shared.

6. No Advertising

No advertisements. Your data is never used for marketing.

7. Developer & Branding

Built by John-de-Scholar (John Damilola Sunday). Developer name appears on login screen, Help, and reports.

8. Referral Programme

Each user has a unique referral link. Only the count of referrals is shown to you — no names or personal details of referred users are ever revealed.

9. Updates & Version Policy

On every new version, all users must re-accept these Terms before continuing. This ensures everyone is always aware of the latest terms.

10. Right to Erasure

You can permanently delete your account and all data at any time via Manage tab → Delete My Account. This is irreversible and cannot be undone.

11. Right to Data Export

Export your data anytime via PDF Report (Dashboard) or Monthly Report (Income). Full CSV export coming in a future update.

12. Age Restriction

You must be at least 16 years old to use this app. By registering you confirm you meet this requirement.

13. Local Storage

This app uses device local storage (similar to cookies) to remember your session and preferences. No tracking cookies are used.

14. Governing Law

Governed by Nigerian law (NDPR) and GDPR where applicable. Last updated: 23 March 2026 (v2.3.0).

15. Contact

myfinanceledgerapp [at] gmail.com
